name: Tropical Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly grease 18 muffin cups or line with paper liners; set aside.
2. Preheat oven to 375°F.
3. In a large bowl, stir together flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt and sugar. Stir in coconut.
4. Make a well in the center of the flour mixture.
5. In a medium bowl, beat eggs. Stir in sourdough starter, oil, bananas, orange juice and orange peel.
6. Pour the egg mixture into the well in the flour mixture.
7. Stir with a fork until the dry ingredients are just moistened.
8. Fill prepared muffin cups 2/3 to 3/4 full with batter.
9. Bake in the preheated oven for 25 to 30 minutes or until golden brown.
10. Remove from muffin cups and serve hot.
Makes 16 to 18 muffins.
